apiProbe.title: API connectivity check
apiProbe.subtitle: Light GET probes against the backend (JWT attached when logged in). HTTP 403/404 still means the server answered — only network errors or timeouts mean the backend is unreachable.

adminBookings.label: Admin bookings
adminBookings.hint: GET /admin/bookings — may return 404 if the endpoint is not deployed.

dashboard.title: Operations overview
dashboard.subtitle: Revenue and order mix are derived from the bookings/tours sample; swap the data source in the overview hook when a consolidated statistics API ships.
dashboard.metaAggregated: Estimated from the latest {{count}} bookings (no aggregated payments/admin statistics API yet).
dashboard.mockFallbackBanner: Showing sample data because the bookings API could not be loaded.

revenue.label: Total revenue
revenue.hint: From paid rows in the sample (max {{count}} bookings)

chart.orderStatusSubtitle: Share of bookings in the current sample

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.subtitle: Latest 5 bookings
activity.filterTitle: Filtering will connect when the API supports it

warnings.bookings_api_fallback: Bookings API is using `/bookings/me` fallback — metrics reflect the signed-in user only, not the whole system.
warnings.bookings_load_error: Could not load bookings — showing sample data.
warnings.bookings_missing_after_load: Missing bookings after load — showing sample data.
warnings.tours_load_error: Could not load the active tour list.
warnings.users_load_error: Could not load the admin user list.
warnings.tours_kpi_unavailable: Could not load active tours — tours KPI set to 0.
warnings.users_kpi_unavailable: Could not load users — new customers KPI set to 0.
warnings.chart_limited_to_page_sample: Monthly revenue chart is capped at {{rows}} rows from the current page — system totals need a statistics API.

tours.pageSubtitle: Monitor tour catalog, status and key operational fields.

form.name: Tour name
form.draftHint: Draft is auto-saved in your browser while you edit.

destinationSelect.hint: Type at least 1 character to search.
destinationSelect.beGapWarning: Backend has not exposed Long id on the destination DTO yet — please input the ID manually for now.

tags.beGapWarning: Backend /admin/tags endpoint is not available yet — enter tag IDs as a comma-separated list.

upload.empty: No media yet. Upload files or paste a URL.
upload.failed: Failed to upload file. Please retry.
upload.beGapWarning: Backend /admin/files/upload is not available yet — please paste the URL directly.

itinerary.subtitle: Each entry represents one day. You can add, remove and re-order them freely.
itinerary.title: Day title

dialog.createSubtitle: Provide the essentials; media and itinerary can be added later.
dialog.editSubtitle: Saved changes will affect the public listing.
dialog.deleteMessage: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". Are you sure?

toast.createFailed: Could not create tour. Please retry.
toast.updateFailed: Could not update tour. Please retry.
toast.deleteFailed: Could not delete tour. Please retry.

validation.codeTooLong: Tour code must not exceed 30 characters.
validation.nameTooLong: Tour name must not exceed 255 characters.
validation.slugFormat: Slug may only contain letters, numbers and dashes.
validation.basePriceMin: From price must be greater than or equal to 0.
validation.listPriceMin: List price must be greater than or equal to 0.
validation.esgScoreRange: ESG score must be between 0 and 100.
validation.leiScoreRange: LEI score must be between 0 and 100.
validation.currencyFormat: Currency must be a 3-letter ISO code (e.g. VND, USD).
validation.durationDaysRequired: Please enter the number of days.
validation.durationDaysMin: Duration must be at least 1 day.
validation.transportTypeTooLong: Transport type must not exceed 120 characters.
validation.tripModeTooLong: Trip mode must not exceed 50 characters.
validation.mediaTypeTooLong: Media type must not exceed 20 characters.
validation.dayNumberMin: Day index must be at least 1.
validation.dayTitleRequired: Please add a title for this day.
validation.dayTitleTooLong: Day title must not exceed 255 characters.

schedules.empty: This tour has no schedules yet.
schedules.errorMessage: Could not load schedules. Please retry.

status.derivedFull: 'Full' is auto-derived from booked seats vs total capacity.

passenger.subtitle: Set price per passenger type. At least one 'Adult' row is required.
